top_opportunities.title: [bounty] Create a YouTube demo video — Free Lifetime access
top_opportunities.body_preview: We need a professional demo video showing DeepAlpha in action. **What to show:** - Registration flow (30 seconds) - Dashboard overview - Starting the bot in Paper Mode - Real-time positions opening - PnL tracking - Settings (Paper/Live toggle) **Requirements:** - 3-5 minutes long - Screen recording with voiceover (English) - Background music - Upload to YouTube **Reward:** Lifetime Pro access ($199 value) **Difficulty:** Easy (non-coding) RECENT ISSUE COMMENTS: Thanks for opening an issue! **Qui

top_opportunities.source: GitHub search: is:issue state:open bounty USDC -label:invalid -label:wontfix
top_opportunities.title: [$100 Bounty] Box-Project Cube Environment Mapping
top_opportunities.body_preview: A working implementation of Box Projected Cubemap Environment Mapping (BPCEM) will release the bounty of $100 on Bountysource. Sidenote: It doesn't have to be a realtime solution. Implementation material (Inspiration): - http://devlog-martinsh.blogspot.com/2011/09/box-projected-cube-environment-mapping.html - https://seblagarde.wordpress.com/2012/09/29/image-based-lighting-approaches-and-parallax-corrected-cubemap/ - https://rawcdn.githack.com/mrdoob/three.js/r107/examples/webgl_materials_envmap

top_opportunities.title: [Bounty: $200] Website
top_opportunities.body_preview: Every well established and _important_ open source project needs a website! I think that a website would be great to attract contributions and customers. Since we have the budget of Free the best way to host a website for us would be Github Pages. top_opportunities.title: Add new bounty email subscription feature. [$250]
top_opportunities.body_preview: Would it be possible to get a feature where I could be notified by email whenever a new bounty is posted that meets some specific search criteria? (Or when an existing bounty changes in a way that makes it meet the criteria.) RECENT ISSUE COMMENTS: Would you have to-be a member of bountysource, or confirm to be notified ? I have no idea, but I don't mind either way. Sounds like a saved search -> notify when there are updates every x interval. So it would be on the user with the interest to confi

top_opportunities.title: Data Analytics Ideas Bounty
top_opportunities.body_preview: ### Prize Title Ethereum Data Analytics Ideas Bounty ### Prize Bounty - 1st - 750 USDC & 1 Vigilante NFT - 2nd - 500 USDC - 3rd - 250 USDC ### Challenge Description In this bounty, participants will be tasked with detailing a process for how they’d analyze data focused on assets, addresses, contracts, and transactions on the Ethereum blockchain. top_opportunities.title: Vigilante Recon NFT Bounty
top_opportunities.body_preview: ### Prize Title Vigilante Recon NFT Bounty ### Prize Bounty - 1st - 500 USDC & 1 Vigilante NFT - 2nd - 300 USDC - 3rd - 200 USDC ### Challenge Description In this bounty, participants will be tasked with creating an interesting narrative utilizing at least one Vigilante Recon NFT Map. These are NFTs that update every time they are viewed, by mapping the location of the viewer. Warning: Viewing Vigilante Recon NFTs will lead to your IP address being logged. top_opportunities.title: OpenRouter Integration $500
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Overview Implement integration with OpenRouter to provide access to a wide range of LLM models through a single unified API. ## Core Features - OpenRouter API integration - Multiple model support - Unified API interface - Cost optimization - Error handling and retries ## Technical Details - Implement OpenRouter client - Add model selection and routing - Implement rate limiting and quotas - Add cost tracking and optimization - Set up proper error handling ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Implement
